name: @clearline/domain-reconciliation
description: Pure, framework-agnostic bank-feed reconciliation rules — counterparty name similarity (Dice coefficient), the exact/fuzzy/ambiguous/unmatched match classifier a reconciliation run applies per bank line, split-amount validation (portions must sum exactly to the source transaction, to the cent), and internal ledger-balance integrity (postings net to the derived balance). No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/payments.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-010 (US-CW-016 Bank Feed Reconciliation).
